outcome_a.text: A federal infrastructure bill invests $1 trillion into public transportation and broadband expansion using world-class project management, transparent cost controls, and precise needs-based targeting, delivering transformative, long-lasting upgrades to transit and universal broadband access while generating exceptional economic returns well beyond the initial investment.
